About
Request a Demo

Asset Audit

Start with clarity. Know exactly where your monitoring gaps are.

An asset audit quantifies your coverage gap, prioritises your assets by risk, and gives you the data for an internal business case. No commitment beyond the conversation.

What an asset audit delivers

Four outputs. One conversation.

A 30–60 minute conversation about your fleet, your sites, and your current monitoring coverage. We do the analysis. You get the data you need to make a decision.

01

Coverage gap quantification

How many of your rotating assets have condition monitoring today? How many don't? We map the gap across your fleet.

02

Prioritised asset list

Not every asset needs monitoring equally. We rank your assets by criticality, failure risk, and monitoring feasibility.

03

ROI estimate

Based on your fleet size, asset types, and industry benchmarks — a first-pass business case for condition monitoring.

04

Deployment recommendation

Where to start, how to phase the rollout, and what resources you need. A concrete plan, not a sales deck.

Request your asset audit

We'll prepare your audit scope and reach out within 2 business days.

Company email preferred
✓

Thanks! We'll prepare your asset audit scope.

We'll reach out within 2 business days with a proposed audit scope. In the meantime, see how Yorkshire Water used SAM4 to monitor 1,300 assets across their entire network.
